name: Aarav Malhotra

planning_style: I like routine and know what works for me, so I guess that answers it.

friends_describe_you: Pretty expressive -- what I feel usually shows on my face -- that's usually what people say about me.
relationship_goal: Honestly, I'm here for marriage -- I'm not looking to waste anyone's time.
favorite_hobby: Hopping on a flight somewhere I haven't been -- I could genuinely talk about it for hours.
conflict_style: Easygoing and warm, someone people feel comfortable around, though I try to actually resolve things rather than let them sit.
social_style: Definitely someone who lights up a room.
self_improvement_area: Probably patience -- and being a bit more ambitious instead of overthinking everything.
ideal_getaway: Somewhere I can do any excuse to dance, honestly, with good food and no fixed plan.
family_importance: family comes first for me, always -- I try to make time for them no matter how busy things get.
first_impression: People usually notice I'm pretty expressive -- what i feel usually shows on my face.

quality_time_means: I tell them, out loud and often -- a genuine compliment goes a long way with me, that's really what quality time means to me.
planning_style: I get bored easily and love mixing things up, so I guess that answers it.
deal_breaker: Someone who shuts down instead of talking things through, and honestly wanting completely different things out of life is the big one too.
friends_describe_you: A bit quiet at first, but very steady once you get to know me -- that's usually what people say about me.
relationship_goal: I want something long-term and serious, marriage down the line if it's right.
favorite_hobby: A few hours lost in a good game -- I could genuinely talk about it for hours.
conflict_style: A straight shooter who won't sugarcoat things, though I try to actually resolve things rather than let them sit.
social_style: Quieter, more of a one-on-one person.
self_improvement_area: Probably patience -- and being a bit more loyal instead of overthinking everything.
ideal_getaway: Somewhere I can do a trail I haven't done before, with good food and no fixed plan.
family_importance: A fair amount -- I check in with them regularly even when life gets busy.
first_impression: People usually notice I'm a bit quiet at first, but very steady once you get to know me.
